artifacts.label: worker journal
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Retain the append-only journal for audit and replay review.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Evidence gap only. The worker can still boot, but historical replay fidelity is reduced.

artifacts.label: paper action log
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Retain when paper mode is used; it is operator evidence, not control truth.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Paper-mode evidence gap only. Safe boot is unaffected.

artifacts.label: runtime cycle summary stream
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Retain for incident review. If lost, later cycles are still safe, but the historical slice is gone.

artifacts.label: incident journal
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Retain as operator evidence. It is not authoritative control state.

artifacts.label: execution evidence
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Retain to preserve execution auditability and replay context.

artifacts.label: kill switch state
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Restore exact state before boot. If absent, the worker must fail closed.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Safe boot is blocked until the operator restores or re-arms the state.

artifacts.label: live control state
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Restore exact state before boot. The worker cannot infer live-control truth from Postgres.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Safe boot is blocked until the operator restores or re-seeds the state explicitly.

artifacts.label: daily loss state
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Restore exact state before boot. Loss accounting must not be guessed.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Safe boot is blocked until the operator restores or re-seeds the state explicitly.

artifacts.label: idempotency cache
artifacts.recoveryExpectation: Restore exact state before boot. Duplicate suppression is safety-critical in live posture.
artifacts.lostArtifactImpact: Safe boot is blocked until the operator restores or re-seeds the state explicitly.

recoveryDrillMissing.label: paper action log
recoveryDrillMissing.recoveryExpectation: Retain when paper mode is used; it is operator evidence, not control truth.
recoveryDrillMissing.lostArtifactImpact: Paper-mode evidence gap only. Safe boot is unaffected.

recoveryDrillMissing.label: execution evidence
recoveryDrillMissing.recoveryExpectation: Retain to preserve execution auditability and replay context.

bootCheck.message: Worker disk recovery prerequisites are present and valid.

databaseRehearsalStatus.statusMessage: No database rehearsal evidence is recorded.

alert.summary: No database rehearsal evidence is recorded.
alert.recommendedAction: Run the Render rehearsal refresh or a manual rehearsal before promotion.

operatorEvidenceChecklist.label: Capture live preflight evidence
operatorEvidenceChecklist.note: Creates the persisted live-preflight evidence sidecar next to JOURNAL_PATH.

operatorEvidenceChecklist.label: Capture boot-critical worker state
operatorEvidenceChecklist.note: Use the boot-critical artifact report before any rollout decision.

incidentRunbook.trigger: Adapter health degrades or provider data becomes unavailable.
incidentRunbook.operatorAction: Hold rollout, inspect GET /health and GET /kpi/adapters, then pause or stop live operation.

incidentRunbook.trigger: Signer URL or signer authorization fails during live-preflight or runtime start.
incidentRunbook.operatorAction: Fail closed, stop live operation, and re-run live preflight after the signer boundary is restored.

incidentRunbook.trigger: Runtime or adapter state degrades but paper-safe operation remains available.
incidentRunbook.operatorAction: Keep live disabled, review readiness blockers, and resume only after explicit evidence-backed review.

incidentRunbook.trigger: Emergency stop or control halt is required.
incidentRunbook.operatorAction: Use the emergency stop surface first, then preserve the audit trail and do not re-arm until review completes.

incidentRunbook.trigger: A live promotion must be reversed after application or a bad rollout must be reversed.
incidentRunbook.operatorAction: Use the live-promotion rollback surface tied to the specific request id and record the rollback reason.
